title: Assorted Colours (Blue, Yellow, Red, & Green) Plastic Fly Swatter, 43.7cm (4 Pieces) - Lightweight & Easy-Grip Handle for Effective Pest Control
features: MULTICOLORED CONVENIENCE: Each pack comes with 4 fly swatters in vibrant assorted colors (blue, yellow, red, & green), measuring a convenient 43.7cm in length. Adding a bright touch to your pest control routine

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from sturdy plastic, our fly swatters are designed for longevity and can withstand the force needed to eliminate flies, mosquitoes, and other insects. No more bending or breaking while swatting.

EFFICIENT PEST CONTROL: With their lightweight design and ergonomic handle, our fly swatters provide efficient pest control with minimal effort. Keep your space free from pesky insects without breaking a sweat.
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor settings, our fly swatters are ideal for use in homes, offices, picnics, camping trips, and any other place where pesky insects may be present.

EASY STORAGE: The slim and compact design of our fly swatters makes them easy to store in drawers, cabinets, or even hang on hooks for quick access. No more bulky and hard-to-store fly swatters cluttering up your space.
description: Our Fly Swatters will help you clear the bugs from your path in a snap.
